channel.title: Research on NTU IoT Sensing Group
channel.description: Recent content in Research on NTU IoT Sensing Group
channel.copyright: ©{year}, NTU IoT Sensing Group. All Rights Reserved

item.title: Powerline radiation sensing
item.description: Main contributors from the group: Zhenyu (topic coordinator), Qun, Rongrong, Xu, Chaojie

item.title: LoRa radio sensing
item.description: Main contributors from the group: Chaojie (topic coordinator), Linshan, Dongfang Resilient LoRa Networks Attack-Aware Data Timestamping in Low-Power Synchronization-Free LoRaWAN. One-hop Out-of-band Control Planes for Multi-hop Wireless Sensor Networks. LoRa-Based Localization: Opportunities and Challenges. One-Hop Out-of-Band Control Planes for Low-Power Multi-Hop Wireless Networks.

item.title: Acoustic and imagery sensing
item.description: Main contributors from the group: Wenjie (topic coordinator), Qun, Zhenyu, Chaojie, Duc, Siyuan, Jiale AI-Empowered Acoustic Sensing Deep Room Recognition Using Inaudible Echos.

item.title: Building sensing
item.description: Main contributors from the group: Duc (topic coordinator), Rongrong, Yingbo Liu (alumnus) We are interested in designing networked sensing systems to monitor the energy consumption and indoor conditions in various types of building environments (households, offices, data centers). Our research work provides enabling technologies for implementing very energy-efficient data centers in Singapore’s year-round hot and humid tropical condition.

item.title: Secure sensing in AIoT
item.description: Main contributors from the group: Qun (topic coordinator), Zhenyu Moving Target Defense for Embedded Deep Visual Sensing against Adversarial Examples.

item.title: Privacy-preserving sensing in AIoT
item.description: Main contributors from the group: Linshan (topic coordinator), Chaojie, Mengyao (alumnus), Dixing (alumnus) Privacy-Preserving Machine Learning in IoT Challenges of Privacy-Preserving Machine Learning in IoT. Lightweight and Unobtrusive Data Obfuscation at IoT Edge for Remote Inference. On Lightweight Privacy-Preserving Collaborative Learning for Internet-of-Things Objects. Differentially Private Collaborative Learning for the IoT Edge.
